title: Ancient Tome
description: Replaces enchanted books in loot chests with ancient tomes to save inventory space while exploring
body:
## Description

Ancient tomes replace enchanted books inside loot chests, 

instead of filling your inventory with books you can stack ancient tomes and turn them into books later by right clicking them.

## Gallery

Loot chest at ancient city
